title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Reckitt India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Reckitt India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Reckitt India Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Reckitt India Holdings Services:
Reckitt India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reckitt India Holdings Services!
